description: Global weather intelligence service providing current conditions, forecasts, alerts, historical data, and location management via precise geographic coordinates.

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Retrieve a multi-day weather forecast for any coordinate on Earth.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -90 to 90.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -180 to 180.

days.description: Number of forecast days to return (default 3).

precipitation.description: Chances and amounts of precipitation for each forecast day.

weather_conditions.description: Descriptive summary of expected weather (e.g., sunny, cloudy).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the forecast data was generated.

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Fetch real-time weather conditions for any coordinate on Earth.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -90 to 90.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -180 to 180.

wind.description: Current wind metrics including speed and direction.

tools.name: search_location
tools.description: Resolve a city name into geographic coordinates and metadata.

city.description: City name to search for (e.g., 'Paris' or 'New York').

latitude.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -90 to 90.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -180 to 180.

location.description: Geographic coordinates of the searched city.

population.description: Population count of the matched city.

country.description: Country in which the city is located.

tools.name: get_alerts
tools.description: Retrieve active or all weather alerts for a specific coordinate.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -90 to 90.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -180 to 180.

active_only.description: When true, return only currently active alerts; when false, include past alerts as well.

severity.description: Alert severity level: Extreme → Severe → Moderate → Minor.

event.description: Short description of the weather event.

instructions.description: Recommended safety actions for the public.

areas.description: List of geographic areas affected by this alert.

alerts.description: List of weather alerts applicable to the requested coordinates.

tools.name: get_historical_weather
tools.description: Observe past weather conditions for a coordinate within a date range.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -90 to 90.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -180 to 180.

start_date.description: Start date for historical data in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End date for historical data in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

limit.description: Maximum number of historical records to return (default 10).

records.description: Chronological list of historical weather observations.

tools.name: save_location
tools.description: Store a geographic coordinate under a custom alias for quick future access.

alias.description: Short unique identifier you will use to recall this location.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -90 to 90.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location in decimal degrees, ranging from -180 to 180.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the saved location.

tools.name: list_saved_locations
tools.description: Enumerate all previously saved location aliases with their coordinates.

alias.description: User-defined alias for the saved location.

name.description: Display name of the saved location.

locations.description: List of all saved locations with aliases and coordinates.

tools.name: get_saved_location
tools.description: Retrieve details of a single saved location by its alias.

alias.description: The alias of the location to retrieve.
User-defined alias for the saved location.

name.description: Display name of the saved location.

timezone.description: Timezone identifier for the saved location.

tools.name: remove_saved_location
tools.description: Delete a saved location using its alias.

alias.description: The alias of the location to delete.

confirmation.description: Message confirming successful removal of the saved location.

remaining_count.description: Number of locations still saved after this deletion.
